name: ultraprompt
description: Ultraprompt V9.1 cognitive control-plane plugin for Claude Code and Codex: 56 skills, 35 agents, 42 MCP tools, 33 commands, typed local memory, safe dream jobs, governed learning, workflow pathfinding, capability graph, live Mission Control dashboard, evidence-led release gates, dual-runtime install. V9.1 adds vibe coding: a new ultraprompt:vibe skill + vibe-curator agent + vibe-detect UserPromptSubmit hook that turn open-ended intents into a two-stage AskUserQuestion picker (lane → path) over a typed prompt_path_set.v1 artifact, then expand the chosen seed into a full prompt. Also fixes the SessionStart banner counts bug. V9.0 baseline retained: 42/42 MCP tools carry full risk metadata; _shared/safety-policy.json is the single destructive-command source; PostToolUse evidence-ledger hook makes claim_check reliable; CONTRIBUTING.md onboards external contributors.
